title: eutrema edwardsii subsp. heterophyllum
intro: Eutrema edwardsii subsp. heterophyllum, also known as Mountain Wintergreen, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to Australia and is used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eutrema edwardsii subsp. heterophyllum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Mountain Wintergreen is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be infused in hot water to make a medicinal infusion.
